description: Swap JWT-only auth for active-credential verification on 7 BM2 API endpoints to revoke access on deactivation
deviation_notes: Tasks 2-4 (route swaps) complete. Task 1 (auth tests) and Task 5 (verification) remain. Also fixed datasets route not in original spec. Auth check pattern changed from if (!claims) to if (claims instanceof Response) because requireActive* functions return SessionClaims | Response, not SessionClaims | null.
